MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-29-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LUIS LUNDGREN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
